Operation 'createPush' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary is generic and doesn't convey the targeting capabilities. Description lacks clarity on: (1) supported platforms and message types, (2) what the operation returns (push campaign ID), (3) authentication requirement, and (4) side effects (campaign creation and message queuing). Enhanced version specifies platforms, clarifies return value, adds authentication context, and better explains the action's effects for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Push a notification or message to a single device or a list of devices. Supports broadcast to all devices, targeting by tags, aliases, registration IDs, or segments. Rate limit: 500 requests per second (standard), higher limits available for paid subscribers.
data.summary_suggestion: Send push notification to targeted devices
data.description_suggestion: Sends a push notification or in-app message to devices across Android, iOS, and HarmonyOS platforms. Supports multiple targeting strategies: broadcast to all devices, targeted delivery by tags, aliases, registration IDs, or segments. Accepts notification content, message content, and delivery options. Returns a push campaign ID and status. Rate limit: 500 requests per second (standard), higher limits available for paid subscribers. Requires HTTP Basic Authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary is generic and doesn't convey the targeting capabilities. Description lacks clarity on: (1) supported platforms and message types, (2) what the operation returns (push campaign ID), (3) authentication requirement, and (4) side effects (campaign creation and message queuing). Enhanced version specifies platforms, clarifies return value, adds authentication context, and better explains the action's effects for AI agent decision-making.
